conditions.architecture: Linear homopolymer with various end groups (HO-OH, HO-OC4H9, CH2=CH-OH)
conditions.critical_condition_basis: Retention volume independent of molecular weight up to 20000
conditions.evidence_text: Corresponding to the critical conditions for PEO on the Chrompak RP-18 phase is the composition 58:42 (water-acetonitrile). In this instance the retention volume versus macromolecule size dependence disappears up to a molecular weight of 20000 (Fig. 2).
conditions.notes: Used to separate PEO by functionality types (end groups).
conditions.physical_address: Institute of Chemical Physics, U.S.S.R. Academy of Sciences, Kosygina 4, 117977 Moscow (U.S.S.R.)

conditions.critical_condition_basis: Critical conditions for PEO block (outer blocks invisible), separation by PPO block size
conditions.evidence_text: At the critical point for PEO the outer blocks disappear, irrespective of their length... This phenomenon is illustrated in Figs. 5 and 6. Note the correspondence between the PPO homopolymer homologues and the macromolecules with a different degree of polymerization in the inner block B in the copolymer.
conditions.notes: Critical condition established for PEO block, resulting in separation of the PPO block by size. Used for ABA' block copolymers.
conditions.physical_address: Institute of Chemical Physics, U.S.S.R. Academy of Sciences, Kosygina 4, 117977 Moscow (U.S.S.R.)

conditions.critical_condition_basis: Attempted critical conditions for PPO block
conditions.evidence_text: It is now of interest to find the critical point for the inner PPO block in a three-block copolymer... Unfortunately, on PPO in a THF-water mixture with a small water content. Under these conditions the unmodified sites of the reversed phase, containing -SiOH groups, become significant. Because of the extremely strong interaction of PEO with these sites, the chromatograms... are strongly distorted by elongated tails.
conditions.notes: Critical condition for PPO block could not be successfully realized due to strong interaction of PEO blocks with unmodified silica sites (-SiOH) on the RP-18 column.
conditions.physical_address: Institute of Chemical Physics, U.S.S.R. Academy of Sciences, Kosygina 4, 117977 Moscow (U.S.S.R.)
